summary: Bulk Delete Time and material equipment logs
description: Bulk delete Time and material equipment logs with one request.

schema.description: Array of Time and material equipment logs

description.description: Discription of Time And Material Equipment Log

uom.description: Unit of measure for associate Time And Material Equipment Log

quantity.description: Number of Time And Material Equipment Log used

project_id.description: ID of the project the Time And Material Equipment Log was logged on

time_and_material_entry_id.description: Time And Material Entry ID the Time And Material Equipment Log is associated with

updated_at.description: Date the Time And Material Equipment Log was updated

created_at.description: Date the Time And Material Equipment Log was created

deleted_at.description: Date the Time And Material Equipment Log was deleted

time_and_material_equipment_logs_ids.description: Array of time and material equipment log IDs specified for delete
